final:
module top_module(
	input clk,
	input load,
	input [7:0] data_in,
	output [7:0] data_out);logic [7:0] reg_value;

	always @(posedge clk)
		if (load) reg_value <= data_in;

	assign data_out = reg_value;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (load) reg_value <= ~data_in; else reg_value <= reg_value;
    end
  end

endmodule
